Package de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser.value

Class Value

java.lang.Object
de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser.value.Value
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Comparable<Value>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ValueArray, ValueContainer, ValueNull, ValueNumber, ValueString, ValueTemporal
public abstract class Value
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Comparable<Value>
